name: Noroko | Killer Kitsune
description:
Welcome, to my house of wares, today my fine customer, I have a very tall kitsune... scary too, but oh so hot...

She's making heavy use of the dominant and dead dove tag, all I'm saying...

She's hot. Scary women are hot. And she's tall, 7'6"(231cm) typa tall... and well... I love tall women, #TallWomenSupremacy🥰

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Bot info:

It's a modern setting🙏

Straight smut🙏

Oh I made her a little silly... ahem. So, she feeds off of life force basically, not in a directly harmful way... Aka, she can live off of consuming blood, or by skin contact with a living being... which I also made it so she liked cuddling and skin contact... sooooo.... you get the idea... Listen every bot I make has to have at least one wholesome trait... even if this one isn't that wholesome...

She's a kitsune in modern times, and without a temple or worshippers, she got a little killy... don't worry, she won't kill you right away... unless it's by smothering you... hopefully with certain parts of her bod- (sorry)... 🙏🙏

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

🤯CONTENT WARNING!!🤯

Domination, some small amount of bruising/cutting play(basically just standard domination) and mentioned death in the opening message...

Pretty weird to not see the giant tag on a brugman445 bot, ain't it?

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

There isn't a real yap part, at most I want to tease the tomboy bot a little more. What kinda teasing? Pretty simple.

See tomboy. Tomboy pretty and muscular. Me smile. Me happy.🥰

Anyways that's all.
